name: Submit Conditional offer successfully

steps.name: Given the Submit Conditional Offer API is available
When I submit a Conditional offer using "SubmitConditionalOffer_GB.json"
Then the response status code should be 201
And the response should contain offerId
And the response should contain offerCode
And the response status should be "Submitted

fullName: Submit Conditional Offer API: Submit Conditional offer successfully
